description: You are configuring GPredict for a remote Amazon rainforest biological research outpost. Add a ground station for the primary outpost named Tiputini (0.6383 S, 76.1492 W, 220m) and a coordination hub named Manaus (3.1131 S, 60.0253 W, 92m). Create a tracking module named 'Bio_Relay' containing satellites ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), SO-50 (NORAD 27607), AO-91 (NORAD 43017), and AO-92 (NORAD 43137). Create a second tracking module named 'Trop_Weather' containing GOES 16 (NORAD 41866), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), and SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849). Set Tiputini as the default ground station and delete the Pittsburgh ground station from the system. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
